layer.description: Female character, young adult, pixel-art style, 32×48 px per frame. Body colour: #4A90D9 (blue shirt). Legs: #2A3A5A (dark jeans). No anti-aliasing. Solid fills only. Head: round, 8×8px, skin tone #F0C8A0. Hair: dark brown #3A2010, 6×4px block on top.
Eyes: 2×2 px black dots, positioned at y=14 within the head area. Mouth: 2px wide horizontal line, colour #C86060, y=18. No shading, no anti-aliasing.
Shirt: solid #4A90D9, collar indicated by 2px lighter band. No texture. Pixel-art block shading only (1px darker edges).

animation.description: Idle breathing cycle. Frames 0-2: body shifts up 1px. Frames 3-5: body returns down 1px. Very subtle movement. Colour shifts: each frame slightly brighter then darker to simulate breathing (no blur, integer pixel offsets only).

Walk cycle. Alternating leg positions every 2 frames. Left leg forward frames 0,1; right leg forward frames 4,5. Arms swing opposite to legs. No diagonal anti-aliasing — use staircase pixel lines for diagonals.
